Bankruptcy Lawyers in Georgia

291 listings statewide

Find and compare the best bankruptcy lawyers in Georgia. We list 291 bankruptcy attorneys statewide, with ratings, reviews, and one tap to call. Whether you are weighing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13, many offer a free first consultation to review your debts.

Frequently asked questions

How many bankruptcy lawyers are in Georgia?

Our directory lists 291 bankruptcy lawyers across Georgia, ranked by rating and reviews.

What should I know before hiring a bankruptcy lawyer in Georgia?

Most Georgians file Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Northern or Middle District of Georgia. Whether you qualify for Chapter 7 depends on the means test.

Who is a top bankruptcy lawyer in Georgia?

Valerie Long, Attorney at Law in Columbus is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 299 reviews.
